subcodes.title: Words spoken at Hearst estate in Pleasanton, 1912-10-15
subcodes.first_line: In reality, children are the ornaments at the table... How can we render Thee thanks, O Lord? Thy bounties are endless and our gratitude cannot equal them.... When in the city of Zor the lamp of his life was extinguished
subcodes.first_line_orig: فی الحقیقه اطفال زینت سفره اند علی الخصوص این اطفال که خیلی ملیحند قلوب اطفال بسیار صاف و ساده است
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @prayer to be recited at table, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
